name: Mexican Appetizer Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 can finely chopped chicken or leftover minced turkey or chicken
4 ounce can chopped green chilies, well drained salsa
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Dissolve bouillon in water. Set aside.
In a bowl, beat the cream cheese, chili powder, and hot pepper sauce until smooth.
Add eggs, mixing well.
Add the bouillon liquid, beating until smooth.
Stir in the finely chopped chicken and chopped green chilies.
Pour into a greased cake or quiche pan.
Bake for 30 minutes or until set. Cool.
Carefully run a knife around the edge of the pan.
Turn onto a serving plate.
Top with salsa, grated cheese, and diced green onions.
Serve warm or chilled, with tortilla chips. Refrigerate leftovers.
